subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Wise unto them that have believed in Him and turned towards His straight Path. Verily, the Sun of Justice hath set by reason of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الحکیم لمن آمن به و اقبل الی صراطه المستقیم قد غابت شمس العدل بما
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God
